description: Run comprehensive QA tests on both backend and frontend, then write findings to TEST_REPORT.md. This includes: verifying all Python imports, TypeScript compilation, API contract consistency between frontend and backend, missing PWA icon files, and checking integration of Google OAuth, organization rename/setup features.
steps: Verify all backend Python modules import without errors by running python3 -c 'from app.main import app' in backend/
Verify frontend TypeScript compilation by running npx tsc --noEmit in frontend/
Verify frontend production build by running npm run build in frontend/
Check PWA manifest at frontend/public/manifest.json references icons that exist in frontend/public/icons/ (currently only .gitkeep exists - icon-192.png and icon-512.png are missing)
Check that vite.config.ts references existing assets in includeAssets
Verify all frontend API calls in src/api/ match backend endpoint signatures registered in main.py
Verify Pydantic models in backend/app/models/ are consistent with TypeScript types in frontend/src/types/
Check that all page components imported in App.tsx exist and compile
Verify Google OAuth flow: LoginPage -> signInWithGoogle -> AuthCallbackPage -> googleAuth API -> backend /auth/google endpoint
Verify organization setup flow: OrganizationSetupPage uses updateOrganization API -> backend PATCH /organizations endpoint
Verify OrganizationSettingsPage uses getMyOrganization and updateOrganization APIs
Check that the backend service worker at frontend/public/sw.js is valid
Write all findings to /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/TEST_REPORT.md with sections: Critical Errors, Warnings, Suggestions, using markdown checklist format with file paths and line numbers
acceptance_criteria: TEST_REPORT.md contains sections: Critical Errors, Warnings, Suggestions
Each issue has file path, line number where applicable, and description
Report accurately reflects actual project state
verification: cat /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/TEST_REPORT.md to confirm report exists and is properly formatted
